highlights.text: I wrote on Monday at 4pm: “My general lean is always to defer to the trend.

I wrote at 4pm Wednesday: “We had an absolutely classic Failed Breakdown of this at 3:40PM today…My lean is that bulls need to hold 6518, 6506-08 lowest on any CPI spikes down which targets 6552, 6565, then 6578 megaphone resistance.” We saw exactly this yesterday after a CPI trap down, we rallied to 6578+ to close yesterday at 6600.
My lean was bulls could defend some key supports.
Bear case discussed above.” Overnight we held 6580, then ran to 6604 high of day then dipped.
It is my core setup: The Failed Breakdown.
We have seen one Failed Breakdown every single day this week, and it produced the strength we saw this week.
In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll do a deep dive into some of the quality Failed Breakdowns we had this week, then I’ll talk the actionable trade plan for Monday.
This keeps next target batch live to 6604, 6618, 6642, then 6653.

post_title: 5 Green Days In A Row For SPX. Can It Keep The Streak Going Monday, or Cool-Off Time? September 15 Plan
